tasks.title: Terminal resize handling and edge cases
tasks.notes: Created use-terminal-size.js hook (resize listener, no dangling listeners). Updated package-list.jsx and vaults.jsx to use it. Added stale cache fallback in use-packages.js + getStaleRegistryCache in registry.js. Added zero-search-results emptyMessage in discover.jsx. Added offline warning display.

tasks.title: TUI tests
tasks.notes: Installed ink-testing-library + @vitejs/plugin-react. Created vitest.config.js. 18 TUI tests across 4 test files: tab-bar.test.jsx (3), package-list.test.jsx (6), discover.test.jsx (2), installed.test.jsx (7). Total: 204/204 tests pass.

tasks.title: Update README, npm publish prep, and GitHub Actions workflow
tasks.notes: Updated README.md with TUI usage, '! plug' from Claude Code, tab docs, CLI scripting. Bumped version 1.0.0 → 1.1.0. Added files field (src/, bin/). Created .github/workflows/publish.yml (release.published trigger, npm ci, npm test, npm publish, NPM_TOKEN).

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 4 — Polish & Distribution
tasks.notes: 204/204 tests pass (186 original + 18 TUI). Resize: useTerminalSize hook wired into package-list.jsx and vaults.jsx with proper cleanup. Edge cases: empty vault, no vaults, offline/stale cache, zero search results all handled. Clean exit: Esc + Ctrl+C both work (Ink default for Ctrl+C). README documents TUI and '! plug' usage. package.json: version 1.1.0, files=[src/,bin/]. publish.yml: valid YAML, NPM_TOKEN, tests before publish, release.published trigger only.
